rulings.Case Title: CHUN HON KWAN ET AL VS. WASHINGTON WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Filed By Fire Insurance Exchange
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for ThursdayJuly 5, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT (CONSOLIDATED CASE) FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE, AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Filed By Fire Insurance Exchange GRANTED. Contract interpretation is an issue of law. Moving party shifted its burden to show that the damage and cause of damage alleged in the complaint is excluded from coverage under the policy. Opposition party failed to create a triable issue of fact. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YEN TRAC VS. MONICA GARCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 5, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF YEN TRAC Motion For Entry Of Judgmnt GRANTED. Defendants breached the agreement and continue to breach the agreement while the motion is pending. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA LABITORIA VS. ERLINDA SELMA ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 5, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SELMA Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons GRANTED, subject to opposition. June 23, 2018 service is quashed. = (501/REQ)
